title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at MSC India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at MSC India
jsonLd.description:
Join the MSC India family as a Logistics Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MSC India:
MSC India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MSC India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
